entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Groundnut or peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.), a crop susceptible to aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The contamination of groundnuts by aflatoxins, a widespread serious problem in producing countries

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where the crop is grown relying on rainfall

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: A specific environmental location conducive to preharvest aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: PREHARVEST CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Aflatoxin contamination that occurs in the crop before it is harvested

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency experienced by the crop before harvest

entities.name: WET AND HUMID AREAS
entities.description: Locations where postharvest aflatoxin contamination is more prevalent

entities.name: POSTHARVEST CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Aflatoxin contamination that occurs after the crop has been harvested

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: A method of crop improvement used to develop resistance to aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait of being able to withstand or prevent aflatoxin contamination
